overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a medieval castle or wizarding school, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long dining tables filled with people, and large stained glass windows showing the night sky. The camera maintains a steady elevated perspective overlooking the entire hall from a balcony position.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the dining hall from a high balcony vantage point overlooking the tables

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended by magic forming chandelier clusters above the dining tables
rows of long wooden banquet tables filled with dining ware and seated people
tall gothic arched stained glass windows showing dark blue night sky outside
stone walls adorned with large vertical tapestries and banners
polished stone floor reflecting the warm candlelight
large stone archway at the far end of the hall with wooden doors
stone fireplace structure with glowing embers on the right side of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by magical floating candles. Long wooden tables stretch across the marble floor filled with people dining, while towering stained glass windows line the right wall showing the night outside. Stone walls with tapestries flank the left side, and a large fireplace glows on the right, creating a warm, atmospheric ambiance typical of high-end game engine rendering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall, capturing a scene of magical warmth and architectural grandeur. It begins with a wide view of the marble floor where long wooden tables are filled with dining guests, all illuminated by the soft glow of floating candles. As the camera holds its position, the gaze drifts across the space to reveal towering stained glass windows that frame the dark night sky. The scene then expands to encompass the stone walls adorned with tapestries on the left and a glowing fireplace on the right, finally settling into a rich, atmospheric ambiance.
